content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Best_of_2008.jpg|thumb|300px]]
A list of events in '''2008''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 1|01]] – [[Star Wars Insider 98|''Star Wars Insider'' 98]] published.
*[[January 2|02]] – [[Legacy (2006) 18|''Legacy'' (2006) 18]] released.
*02 – [[Star Wars: Legacy (2006) 0½|''Legacy'' (2006) 0½]] published.
*[[January 9|09]] – [[Star Wars: Dark Times Volume 1—The Path to Nowhere|''Star Wars: Dark Times Volume 1: The Path to Nowhere'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[January 15|15]] – [[Star Wars Insider 99|''Star Wars Insider'' 99]] published.
*15 – - [[Mark Haigh-Hutchinson]] dies.
*[[January 30|30]] – [[Dark Times 8|''Dark Times'' 8]] released.
*30 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 25|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 25]] released.
*30 – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 3: Days of Fear, Nights of Anger]]'' published.

==February==
*[[February 1|01]] – ''[[The Last of the Jedi: Master of Deception]]'' released.
*[[February 6|06]] – [[John Alvin]] dies.
*06 – [[Legacy (2006) 19|''Legacy'' (2006) 19]] released.
*06 – [[Rebellion 11|''Rebellion'' 11]] released.
*[[February 10|10]] – [[Steve Gerber]] dies.
*[[February 18|18]] – ''[[Star Wars: Epic Battles|Epic Battles]]'' published.
*18 – [[Star Wars: The Story of Darth Vader (2008)|''Star Wars: The Story of Darth Vader'']] published.
*[[February 19|19]] – [[Star Wars: A New Hope Cine-Manga|''Star Wars: A New Hope'' Cine-Manga]] published.
*[[February 20|20]] – [[Dark Times 9|''Dark Times'' 9]] released.
*[[February 26|26]] – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]'' released.
*[[February 27|27]] – [[Legacy (2006) 20|''Legacy'' (2006) 20]] released.
*[[February 28|28]] – ''[[The Queen of Air and Darkness]]'' third adventure in the ''[[Dawn of Defiance]]'' campaign published.

==March==
*[[March 3|3]] – [[Kinema Citrus Co.]] founded.
*[[March 11|11]] – [[Star Wars Insider 100|''Star Wars Insider'' 100]] published.
*[[March 12|12]] – [[Legacy (2006) 21|''Legacy'' (2006) 21]] released.
*12 – [[Rebellion 12|''Rebellion'' 12]] released.
*[[March 26|26]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 26|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 26]] released.
*26 – [[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back Cine-Manga|''Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'' Cine-Manga]] published.
*[[March 28|28]] – The [[Legacy of the Force (Star Wars Miniatures)|''Star Wars Miniatures: Legacy of the Force'']] set released.

==April==
*[[April 3|03]] – ''[[Echoes of the Jedi]]'' fourth adventure in the ''[[Dawn of Defiance]]'' campaign published.
*[[April 9|09]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Tales of the Jedi Volume 2]]'' released.
*09 – "[[Labor Pains]]" published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[April 16|16]] – [[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi Cine-Manga|''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'' Cine-Manga]] published.
*[[April 23|23]] – [[Legacy (2006) 22|''Legacy'' (2006) 22]] released.
*23 – [[Dark Times 10|''Dark Times'' 10]] released.
*23 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 27|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 27]] released.
*23 – ''[[Precipice]]'' published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[April 29|29]] – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' paperback released.
*[[April 29|29]] – [[John Berkey]] dies.
*[[April 30|30]] – [[Rebellion 13|''Rebellion'' 13]] paperback released.

==May==
*[[May 6|06]] – [[Star Wars Insider 101|''Star Wars Insider'' 101]] published.
*[[May 7|07]] – ''[[The Last of the Jedi: Reckoning]]'' released.
*07 – [[Legacy (2006) 23|''Legacy'' (2006) 23]] released.
*[[May 13|13]] – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Invincible]]'' released.
*[[May 14|14]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 28|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 28]] released.
*[[May 20|20]] – ''[[Threats of the Galaxy]]'' released.
*[[May 21|21]] – [[Legacy (2006) 24|''Legacy'' (2006) 24]] released.
*21 – [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Cine-Manga|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Cine-Manga]] published.
*[[May 22|22]] – [[Harry Lange]] dies.
*[[May 24|24]] – ''[[Lando Calrissian: Idiot's Array]]'' published in [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[May 29|29]] – [[Harvey Korman]] dies.
*29 – [[Dark Times 11|''Dark Times'' 11]] released.
*29 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 29|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 29]] released.

==June==
*[[June 6|06]]-[[June 8|08]] – The ninth [[Star Wars Weekends|''Star Wars'' Weekends]] event begins at [[Disney's Hollywood Studios]].
*[[June 11|11]] – [[Rebellion 14|''Rebellion'' 14]] released.
*[[June 13|13]] – ''[[The First to Strike]]'' fifth adventure in the ''[[Dawn of Defiance]]'' campaign published.
*13-[[June 15|15]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney's Hollywood Studios.
*15 – [[Stan Winston]] dies.
*[[June 17|17]] – [[Star Wars Insider 102|''Star Wars Insider'' 102]] published in '''US'''.
*[[June 18|18]] – [[Star Wars Omnibus: Droids|''Omnibus: Droids'']] released.
*18 – [[Legacy (2006) 25|''Legacy'' (2006) 25]] released.
*18 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 30|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 30]] released.
*[[June 20|20]]-[[June 22|22]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney's Hollywood Studios.
*[[June 24|24]] – ''[[Coruscant Nights I: Jedi Twilight]]'' released.
*[[June 25|25]] – [[Dark Times 12|''Dark Times'' 12]] released.
*[[June 27|27]]-[[June 29|29]] – ''Star Wars'' Weekends continues at Disney's Hollywood Studios.

==July==
*[[July 10|10]] – [[Star Wars Insider 102|''Star Wars Insider'' 102]] published in '''UK'''.
*[[July 18|18]] – [[Unbound Worlds|Suvudu]] is launched.
*[[July 19|19]] – [[Beau Gadsdon]] is born.
*[[July 22|22]] – [[Greg Burson]] dies.
*[[July 23|23]] – [[Legacy (2006) 26|''Legacy'' (2006) 26]] released.
*23 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 31|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 31]] released.
*[[July 26|26]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (novelization)]]'' released.
*26 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (junior novelization)]]'' released.
*26 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Intergalactic Adventure Activity Book]]'' released.
*26 – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Galactic Photobook]]'' released.
*26 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: The Visual Guide]]'' released.
*26 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Ultimate Sticker Book]]'' released.
*26 – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Battle Begins]]'' released.
*26 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Battle at Teth]]'' released.
*26 – ''[[The Clone Wars: The New Padawan]]'' released.
*26 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Watch out for Jabba the Hutt!]]'' released.
*26 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Anakin in Action!]]'' released.
*[[July 27|27]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (Leapfrog)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']] released on the [[LeapFrog Didj]] console.
*[[July 30|30]] – [[Rebellion 15|''Rebellion'' 15]] released.
*?? – ''[[Out Foxed]]'' published on '''Target.com'''

==August==
*[[August 3|03]] – [[Michel Parbot]] dies.
*[[August 4|04]] – ''[[Star Wars Blueprints: The Ultimate Collection]]'' released.
*[[August 5|05]] – [[Star Wars Insider 103|''Star Wars Insider'' 103]] published.
*[[August 6|06]] – ''[[The Core of Corruption]]'' sixth adventure in the ''[[Dawn of Defiance]]'' campaign published.
*[[August 10|10]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' film]] has its Hollywood red carpet premiere.
*13 – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Times Volume 2—Parallels]]'' published.
*13 – ''[[The Betrayal of Darth Revan]]'' published.
*[[August 15|15]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']] released in cinemas.
*[[August 18|18]] – [[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed (graphic novel)|''The Force Unleashed'' comics]] released.
*[[August 19|19]] – [[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed (novelization)|''The Force Unleashed'' novel]] released.
*19 – The ''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' released.
*19 – [[Champions of the Force (SWGTCG)|''Star Wars Galaxies Trading Card Game: Champions of the Force'']] released.
*19 – ''[[Deader than a Triton Moon]]'' published online at [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[August 20|20]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 32|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 32]] released.
*[[August 21|21]] – ''[[Star Wars: Visions of the Blade]]'' released.
*[[August 22|22]] – "[[Crossroads]]" published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[August 26|26]] – ''[[Coruscant Nights II: Street of Shadows]]'' released.
*26 – ''[[The Dark Lord Trilogy]]'' released.
*[[August 27|27]] – [[Legacy (2006) 27|''Legacy'' (2006) 27]] released.
*27 – [[Rebellion 16|''Rebellion'' 16]] released.

==September==
*[[September 1|01]] – [[Don LaFontaine]] dies.
*[[September 10|10]] – [[The Clone Wars 1|''The Clone Wars'' 1]] released.
*[[September 12|12]] – [[Del Rey]] and [[LucasBooks]] announce extension of Star Wars publishing contract and new multi-book series.
*[[September 16|16]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]'' video game released.
*16 – ''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]'' released.
*16 – ''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' released.
*[[September 17|17]] – ''[[Star Wars: Luke Skywalker, Last Hope for the Galaxy]]'' released.
*17 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 33|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 33]] released.
*[[September 23|23]] – [[Star Wars Insider 104|''Star Wars Insider'' 104]] published.
*[[September 24|24]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Shipyards of Doom]]'' released.
*24 – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Early Victories]]'' released.
*24 – [[Legacy (2006) 28|''Legacy'' (2006) 28]] released.
*[[September 29|29]] – ''[[Interference]]'' published.

==October==
*[[October 2|02]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Decide Your Destiny: The Way of the Jedi]]'' published.
*02 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Prelude]]'' webcomic, first instalment in The Clone Wars webcomic series, posted on [[StarWars.com]].
*02 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Shakedown]]'' webcomic published online.
*02 – ''[[HoloNet News — A Galaxy Divided]]'' podcast released online.
*[[October 3|03]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' television series begins airing, with the episodes "[[Ambush]]" and "[[Rising Malevolence|Rising ''Malevolence'']]."
*[[October 6|06]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Procedure]]'' published [[StarWars.com|online]].
*[[October 8|08]] – ''[[Iridonian Darkness]]'' published on [[Wizards.com]].
*[[October 10|10]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Shadow of Malevolence|Shadow of ''Malevolence'']]" airs.
*[[October 14|14]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Agenda]]'' webcomic published online.
*[[October 15|15]] – [[The Clone Wars 2|''The Clone Wars'' 2]] released.
*[[October 17|17]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Destroy Malevolence|Destroy ''Malevolence'']]" airs.
*[[October 21|21]] – ''[[Millennium Falcon (novel)]]'' released.
*[[October 22|22]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 34|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 34]] released.
*[[October 23|23]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Mouse Hunt]]'' webcomic published online.
*[[October 24|24]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Rookies (episode)|Rookies]]" airs.
*[[October 28|28]] – ''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]'' paperback released.
*[[October 29|29]] – [[Legacy (2006) 29|''Legacy'' (2006) 29]] released.
*[[October 31|31]] – ''[[Fists of Ion]]'' published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*?? – [[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] was to be released, but cancelled.

==November==
*[[November 3|03]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' television series begins airing in [[Wikipedia:Mexico|Mexico]].
*[[November 4|04]] – The [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (Star Wars Miniatures)|''Star Wars Miniatures: The Clone Wars'']] set released.
*04 – [[Star Wars Insider 105|''Star Wars Insider'' 105]] published.
*[[November 7|07]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Downfall of a Droid]]" airs.
*07 – ''[[A Reckoning of Wraiths]]'' seventh adventure in the ''[[Dawn of Defiance]]'' campaign published.
*07 – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Fall of Falleen]]'' webcomic published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[November 11|11]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Jedi Alliance]]'' released.
*11 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Lightsaber Duels]]'' released.
*11 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Jedi Alliance: Prima Official Game Guide]]'' released.
*11 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Lightsaber Duels: Prima Official Game Guide]]'' released.
*[[November 12|12]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Discount]]'' webcomic published [[StarWars.com|online]].
*[[November 14|14]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Duel of the Droids]]" airs.
*[[November 16|16]] – ''[[Robot Chicken: Star Wars Episode II]]'' airs.
*[[November 18|18]] – [[Scum and Villainy (sourcebook)|''Scum and Villainy'']] released.
*[[November 19|19]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 35|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 35]] released.
*19 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Departure]]'' webcomic published online.
*19 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (mobile)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' mobile game]] released.
*[[November 20|20]] – ''[[HoloNet News — Rodia Supply Lanes Attacked by Pirates]]'' released on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[November 21|21]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Bombad Jedi]]" airs.
*[[November 25|25]] – [[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] paperback released.
*26 – [[Legacy (2006) 30|''Legacy'' (2006) 30]] released.
*26 – ''[[Rogue Leaders: The Story of LucasArts]]'' published.

==December==
*[[December 1|01]] – ''[[Star Wars: R2-D2 and Friends]]'' published.
*01 – "[[Castaways of Endor]]" published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[December 2|02]] – ''[[Rebel Force: Target]]'' released.
*02 – ''[[Rebel Force: Hostage]]'' released.
*[[December 4|04]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Transfer]]'' webcomic published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[December 5|05]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Cloak of Darkness]]" airs.
*[[December 9|09]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Wild Space]]'' released.
*09 – ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' released.
*[[December 10|10]] – [[The Clone Wars 3|''The Clone Wars'' 3]] released.
*10 – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Dreams of General Grievous]]'' webcomic published online.
*[[December 12|12]] – ''The Clone Wars'': "[[Lair of Grievous]]" airs.
*12 – ''[[HoloNet News — Chancellor Palpatine's Approval Rating Falls]]'' podcast released online.
*[[December 16|16]] – ''[[Squadrons Over Corellia]]'' released.
*[[December 17|17]] – [[Star Wars Insider 106|''Star Wars Insider'' 106]] shipped to subscribers.
*17 – ''[[Star Wars: Legacy Volume 4: Alliance]]'' published.
*[[December 24|24]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 36|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 36]] released.
*24 – [[Legacy (2006) 31|''Legacy'' (2006) 31]] released.
*[[December 30|30]] – ''[[Luke Skywalker and the Shadows of Mindor]]'' released.
*30 – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Invincible]]'' paperback released.
*[[December 31|31]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Crash Course]]'' released.
----
